# Riverbend Reference Totals — CY2025 (corrected ground truth)

**INSTRUCTOR ONLY.** Generated by `tools/reference-totals.py` after applying
the answer-key corrections (flaws 1, 3, 6, 9). Use for grading Week 3 inventories.
Student answers within ~1% of these (or with documented alternative treatment of
RBC-06/leased offices/estimated gap months) are correct.

## Notes for graders

- Electricity (Scope 2) emissions depend on the eGRID factor vintage/state the
  student chose — grade the *method and documentation*, not a single number.
- Gas Scope 1 uses 0.00531 mt CO2e/therm (EPA), the factor taught in the course.
- RBC-06 (divested Aug 2025): totals above INCLUDE its Jan-Aug consumption.
  Excluding it entirely is acceptable if documented as a boundary decision.
- RBC-04 gap months (Mar-May) are NOT estimated in these totals; a student who
  interpolates will land ~2-3% higher on RBC-04 — fine if tagged as estimated.
- Fleet fuel, refrigerants, and leased offices are excluded here (fleet is a
  separate Scope 1 line; refrigerants are unquantifiable by design).
